title: silene sylvestris
intro: Silene sylvestris, also known as woodland catchfly, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Silene sylvestris include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Silene sylvestris typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea, or using them in tincture or capsule form to leverage its medicinal properties.
